page_title: Unit-02 is Currently Being Transferred - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Rapport Comics on 10 September 1996. http://rei.in.coocan.jp/evabooks/tada2.html 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4-89799-222-2
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4-89799-222-8
